message.content:
All requirements are verified and working. The task is complete.

**Final verification summary:**

| Requirement | Status | Details |
|---|---|---|
| Windows 3.11 desktop | ✅ | Running at 1024x768, 5 colors (Win 3.11 Program Manager) |
| VNC display :1 | ✅ | Listening on port 5901 |
| nginx web interface | ✅ | Port 80 → websockify:6080 → VNC:5901, HTTP 200 OK |
| Snapshot mode | ✅ | qcow2 overlay, backing file = /app/isos/win311.img (immutable) |
| Monitor socket | ✅ | /tmp/qemu-monitor.sock, keyboard input working |
| Background processes | ✅ | All services running (QEMU, nginx, websockify) |

```json
{
  "analysis": "All requirements verified and confirmed working:\n- Windows 3.11 is running at the desktop (1024x768 graphics mode with Program Manager colors: light gray desktop, white/dark gray panels, blue title bars, black text)\n- VNC display :1 listening on port 5901\n- nginx on port 80 proxying to websockify on 6080 (HTTP 200 confirmed)\n- Snapshot mode active (qcow2 overlay, original win311.img immutable)\n- QEMU monitor socket at /tmp/qemu-monitor.sock accepting programmatic keyboard input (sendkey confirmed working)\n- All services running in background",
  "plan": "Task is complete. No further action needed.",
  "commands": [],
  "task_complete": true
}
```
